name: Cococola Barbequed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Rinse chicken pieces and pat dry.
3. Combine flour and 2 teaspoons salt in a shallow dish.
4. Coat the chicken thoroughly with the seasoned flour mixture.
5. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Brown the chicken pieces on all sides in the hot oil, then drain on paper towels to remove excess fat.
7. Place the chicken in a 3-quart casserole dish.
8. In a separate bowl, combine diced onion, celery, green pepper, ketchup, Coca Cola, Worcestershire sauce, hickory smoked salt (if using), basil leaves, chili powder, and salt and pepper to taste.
9. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
10. Spoon the sauce over the chicken to cover all pieces.
11. Cover the dish and bake in the preheated oven for about 1 1/4 hours, or until the chicken is fork-tender.
